title: Epitaph On Charles II
content:
Here lies a great and mighty King,
Whose promise none relied on;
He never said a foolish thing,
Nor ever did a wise one.
meaning:
John Wilmot's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Epitaph On Charles II"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
